query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class values to identify high risk class

3.description: retrieve high-risk quick-clay hazard polygons within Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: retrieve parcels larger than 5000 m² within Trondheim municipality

5.description: identify parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: ensure one row per parcel with largest intersecting hazard area

9.description: join municipality and county names for final reporting
